regions.name: gameplay_underlay
regions.notes: The world and any HUD under the modal remain live runtime content; do not bake into overlay art.

regions.name: modal_shell
regions.notes: Modal frame/panel chrome may be generated as reusable runtime art.

regions.name: prompt_title
regions.notes: Prompt title remains localizable live FText.

regions.name: choice_buttons
regions.notes: Button plates may be generated, but YES/NO labels and interaction states remain runtime-owned.
